prestazioni: 4G63T (7th-gen block, 85mm bore, forged internals) with a Tomei 2.2L stroker kit (88mm crank, 150mm H-beam rods, 87mm forged pistons) and Tomei Type-S camshafts (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) for high-RPM power delivery

Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel) with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller targeting 2.2 bar (32 psi) peak pressure

HKS Hi-Power 70mm titanium exhaust system with 2.5" piping, 50mm wastegate dump tubes, and a custom 3" straight-pipe resonator delete for optimized spool and top-end flow, paired with an HKS Racing Suction Reloaded intake (carbon fiber heat shield, 80mm MAF housing)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and overfenders) with custom carbon fiber canards and a 3D-printed ABS front splitter (50mm overhang, 3-stage dive planes) for aero balance
Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 80mm drop, pillowball top mounts) with Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow aluminum) and a Cusco 2-point rear sway bar (22mm adjustable)
Voltex Type-7 rear wing (1,200mm width, 300mm height, carbon fiber construction) with custom aluminum wing stands (50mm taller than OEM) and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (vented, 30% weight reduction)
